channel.title: Cloud on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on jamesm.blog

item.title: AI Cloud Subscriptions: Comparing Pricing and Features in 2026
item.description: A 2026 buyer's guide to AI cloud subscriptions. Compare API pricing, context windows, rate limits, and consumer plans across Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, xAI, Mistral, and DeepSeek.

item.title: AWS S3 Files - Bridging File Systems and Object Storage
item.description: Explore AWS S3 Files, a new file system interface that brings high-performance file access to Amazon S3 data without duplication or complex integration.

item.title: DevOps Cheatsheets
item.description: Quick reference guides and cheatsheets for DevOps tools, cloud computing concepts, Linux commands, and Kubernetes operations.

item.title: AWS Summit London (2023) - Agenda Announcement
item.description: AWS Summit London 2023 agenda announcement with keynote details, technical tracks, and planning guidance for attendees.

item.title: DevOps Blogs
item.description: Curated list of DevOps and SRE blogs covering infrastructure, automation, continuous delivery, platform engineering, and operational best practices.

item.title: Monitoring and Observability
item.description: Guide to monitoring and observability tools for cloud infrastructure and applications - AWS CloudWatch, Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus, and open-source alternatives.

item.title: DevOps Conferences
item.description: Guide to major DevOps conferences and summits - KubeCon, DevOpsDays, PlatformCon, AWS re:Invent - covering cloud infrastructure, SRE, and platform engineering.
